summary: Error Monitoring System testing completed successfully. All backend APIs (18 tests) and frontend components are working correctly. The system includes AI-powered error classification using GPT-4o via Emergent LLM Key.

tests: Report frontend error with full payload
Returns total_errors, critical_count, high_count, medium_count, low_count

features_tested.feature: Error Monitoring Tab in Super Admin Dashboard
tests: Tab visible in Super Admin Dashboard
Date range selector works (Last 7 days default)
Shows App Flow 61%, Runtime 12%, HTTP/Network 7%, Unknown 10%, API 2%, etc.
Modal opens on error row click
Shows First Seen and Last Seen timestamps
Shows Error Message in red box
Shows AI Analysis section with GPT analysis
Shows Ignore, Acknowledge, Apply Fix buttons

critical_code_review_comments: AI classification is properly integrated using Emergent LLM Key (GPT-4o)
Auto-fix works for low/medium severity errors
Critical/high severity errors require manual approval
Error deduplication is working (groups similar errors within 24h)
Notifications created for critical/high severity errors
seed_data_creation: Test errors created via API during backend tests, all marked as TEST_ prefix for cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Error Monitoring System is fully functional. All 15 error categories (syntax, build_compile, runtime, logical, system, application_flow, user_input, api, http_network, database, security, performance, configuration, integration, unknown) are supported. AI classification uses GPT-4o via Emergent LLM Key. The ErrorMonitoringDashboard.js component is imported and displayed in the 'errors' tab of SuperAdminDashboard.js.
